ideation: This sequence depicts a chick hatching, with the arms mimicking the breaking of the eggshell. The movement starts with arms slightly raised, suggesting anticipation, then progresses to a forceful push, followed by a relaxing of the arms as the chick emerges.  The final frame shows the arms gently moving to the sides.  The arms' movements are synchronized to increase expressiveness.

frames.beat: arms push upwards, breaking free from the shell
a strong outward thrust, the egg cracks open
arms relax slightly, emerging into the world
newly hatched, arms settle gently at the sides
